description:
# Context 

Dataset about customer shopping behavior, capturing demographics, purchase details, and buying preferences.

# Content 

Includes customer info, purchased items, spending amounts, product attributes, discounts, shipping, and purchasing frequency.

recordsets.recordset_description:
# About This File 

This dataset contains customer shopping behavior records, including demographics, product details, purchase amounts, discounts, reviews, and buying frequency. It helps analyze spending patterns, product preferences, and customer engagement for retail insights.

results.reason: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) is out of scope for sensitivity unless it explicitly encodes a sensitive class.

Financial transaction detail, not directly related to IN-SCOPE socioeconomic status (which refers to social origin/class, property, public assistance).
